description: arXiv:2605.15995v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Learning latent representations from complex data is central to modern machine learning, spanning temporal, multimodal, and partially observed systems. In such settings, representations are more naturally understood as latent states capturing underlying system dynamics rather than compressed summaries of observations. Yet current approac...
